creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm testing the port.

You state in the bug description you want to take maintainership, but you did not modify the MAINTAINER line in the port in your patch. Standard practice is to modify it when asking for maintainership.

So for a confirmation, are you still willing to take maintainership? Should I set the MAINTAINER line to the address mizhka@gmail.com?

BTW there are a few fixes needed to this submission and bug 201041 before they can be committed. I'll post a descriptions of the changes I made once I'm though with testing.

Thanks for you submissions!
